name: Lundin Petroleum AB
description: Lundin Petroleum AB, now known as Orrön Energy AB, was a Sweden-based company formerly focused on oil and gas exploration and production. Following a significant corporate transformation, the company transitioned into an independent, publicly listed renewable energy firm. Today, it operates and develops a portfolio of high-quality onshore renewable energy assets, including wind power, solar, and battery storage projects across the Nordics, the UK, Germany, and France. The company is dedicated to creating long-term shareholder value by actively participating in the global energy transition through sustainable investments and greenfield growth opportunities.
